bot_response: Hello! Welcome to St. Jonathan High School. How can I help you today? Feel free to ask me about admissions, fees, academics, or any other school-related information.

📍 **School Information:**
        • Name: St. Jonathan High School
        • Address: P.O. Box 12352,   Mukono
        • Location: Jinja-Kampala Highway, next to Mbalala Trading Centre
        • Phone: +256325516717
        • Email: info@stjJonathan.ug
        • Principal: Dr. Samuel Mugisha

💰 **St. Jonathan High School Fee Structure:**
Please note that fees vary by class and academic year. Current approximate rates:

• Senior 1-2: UGX 1,500,000 - 2,000,000 per term
• Senior 3-4: UGX 2,300,000 - 3,000,000 per term
• O-Level: UGX 3,000,000 - 3,500,000 per term
• A-Level: UGX 3,500,000 - 4,000,000 per term

This includes: tuition, accommodation, meals, and basic amenities.
Additional charges: uniforms, books, and activity fees.

For detailed current fees, please contact the Accounts Department at +256701416197

bot_response:
⚖️ **School will in may 8th 2025:**

**Expected Conduct:**
• Punctuality to classes and school events
• Proper school uniform at all times
• Respect for teachers and authority
• No smoking, alcohol, or drugs
• Maintain school property
• Academic honesty (no cheating)

**Disciplinary Measures:**
• Verbal warnings
• Written warnings
• Community service
• Detention
• Suspension (for serious offenses)
• Expulsion (for major violations)

**Appeal Process:**
Students and parents can appeal disciplinary decisions to the Principal within 7 days.

**Contact for Discipline Issues:** Call +256325516717 and request the Dean of Discipline.

🏠 **Boarding Facilities:**
Yes! St. Jonathan High School provides boarding facilities.

✅ **Boarding Options:**
• Boarding accommodation available for all levels
• Separate dormitories for boys and girls
• Modern facilities with security surveillance
• 24/7 residential staff supervision
• Feeding program included (3 meals daily)
• Common rooms with recreational facilities

**Boarding Requirements:**
• Separate boarding fees apply
• Medical examination required
• Bedding and personal items to be provided
• Parent consent form required

For boarding inquiries, contact the Boarding Master/Matron at +256325516717
